trans-unit.source: Not sorted, press space to sort ascending
trans-unit.target: Not sorted, press space to sort ascending

trans-unit.source: Sorted ascending, press space to sort descending
trans-unit.target: Sorted ascending, press space to sort descending

trans-unit.source: Sorted descending, press space to sort ascending
trans-unit.target: Sorted descending, press space to sort ascending

trans-unit.note: {1} = Package ID, {2} = Package version

trans-unit.source: Promote all to top level dependencies
trans-unit.target: Promote all to top level dependencies

trans-unit.source: Promote to a top level dependency
trans-unit.target: Promote to a top level dependency

trans-unit.source: Use arrow keys to change the size of the sections
trans-unit.target: Use arrow keys to change the size of the sections

trans-unit.source: Argument cannot be null or empty.
trans-unit.target: Argument cannot be null or empty.

trans-unit.source: Consider migrating this project's NuGet package management format from 'packages.config' to 'PackageReference'.
trans-unit.target: Consider migrating this project's NuGet package management format from 'packages.config' to 'PackageReference'.

trans-unit.source: Some NuGet packages are missing from this solution. Click to restore from your online package sources.
trans-unit.target: Some NuGet packages are missing from this solution. Click to restore from your online package sources.

trans-unit.source: A new version of NuGet Package Manager is available.
trans-unit.target: A new version of NuGet Package Manager is available.

trans-unit.source: Implicitly referenced by an SDK. To update the package, update the SDK to which it belongs.
trans-unit.target: Implicitly referenced by an SDK. To update the package, update the SDK to which it belongs.

trans-unit.note: American billions in short format notation
DoNotShowThisAgain, Button_Cancel, Button_Copy and Button_Apply must have underscore in different letters. See https://docs.microsoft.com/windows/apps/design/input/access-keys#choose-access-keys
DoNotShowThisAgain, Button_Cancel, Button_Copy and Button_Apply must have underscore in different letters. See https://docs.microsoft.com/windows/apps/design/input/access-keys#choose-access-keys
DoNotShowThisAgain, Button_Cancel, Button_Copy and Button_Apply must have underscore in different letters. See https://docs.microsoft.com/windows/apps/design/input/access-keys#choose-access-keys
Button_IAccept and Button_IDecline must have underscore in different letters. See https://docs.microsoft.com/windows/apps/design/input/access-keys#choose-access-keys
Button_IAccept and Button_IDecline must have underscore in different letters. See https://docs.microsoft.com/windows/apps/design/input/access-keys#choose-access-keys
Button_Yes, Button_No, Button_YesToAll, Button_NoToAll must have underscore in different letters. See https://docs.microsoft.com/windows/apps/design/input/access-keys#choose-access-keys
Button_Yes, Button_No, Button_YesToAll, Button_NoToAll must have underscore in different letters. See https://docs.microsoft.com/windows/apps/design/input/access-keys#choose-access-keys
Button_Cancel and Button_OK must have underscore in different letters. See https://docs.microsoft.com/windows/apps/design/input/access-keys#choose-access-keys
The string format has a single parameter "{0}", which is an integer number of how many more results will be displayed to the user when they click a button.
Button_Yes, Button_No, Button_YesToAll, Button_NoToAll must have underscore in different letters. See https://docs.microsoft.com/windows/apps/design/input/access-keys#choose-access-keys
Button_Yes, Button_No, Button_YesToAll, Button_NoToAll must have underscore in different letters. See https://docs.microsoft.com/windows/apps/design/input/access-keys#choose-access-keys

trans-unit.source: Allow format selection on first package install
trans-unit.target: Allow format selection on first package install

trans-unit.note: Name for the checkbox to be narrated by UI Automation Tree

trans-unit.source: Select this checkbox to install the NuGet Package to all projects in the solution
trans-unit.target: Select this checkbox to install the NuGet Package to all projects in the solution
trans-unit.note: Help text for the checkbox to be narrated by UI Automation Tree

trans-unit.source: Select this checkbox to install the NuGet Package to the project '{0}'
trans-unit.target: Select this checkbox to install the NuGet Package to the project '{0}'
trans-unit.note: Help text for the checkbox to install a NuGet package to a specific project.

trans-unit.source: Force uninstall, even if there are dependencies on it
trans-unit.target: Force uninstall, even if there are dependencies on it

trans-unit.source: Select to view the alternative package.
trans-unit.target: Select to view the alternative package.

trans-unit.source: This package version is deprecated. Use {0} instead.
trans-unit.target: This package version is deprecated. Use {0} instead.
trans-unit.note: {0} is a NuGet package id (string)
DoNotShowThisAgain, Button_Cancel, Button_Copy and Button_Apply must have underscore in different letters. See https://docs.microsoft.com/windows/apps/design/input/access-keys#choose-access-keys

trans-unit.source: NuGet requires HTTPS sources. To use an HTTP source, you must explicitly set 'allowInsecureConnections' to true in your NuGet.Config file.
trans-unit.target: NuGet requires HTTPS sources. To use an HTTP source, you must explicitly set 'allowInsecureConnections' to true in your NuGet.Config file.

trans-unit.note: {0} is the package ID

trans-unit.source: Project {0} does not exist in the project system cache.
trans-unit.target: Project {0} does not exist in the project system cache.

trans-unit.source: The package `{0}` is available in the Global packages folder, but the source it came from `{1}` is not one of the configured sources.
trans-unit.target: The package `{0}` is available in the Global packages folder, but the source it came from `{1}` is not one of the configured sources.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the package ID. {1} is the URI of the package source found in the Global packages folder.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while trying to load the README.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while trying to load the README.

trans-unit.note: {0} - The Name of a user-configured NuGet Package Source

trans-unit.source: This package has been deprecated as it has critical bugs.
trans-unit.target: This package has been deprecated as it has critical bugs.

trans-unit.source: This package has been deprecated as it is legacy and no longer maintained.
trans-unit.target: This package has been deprecated as it is legacy and no longer maintained.

trans-unit.source: This package has been deprecated as it has critical bugs and is no longer maintained.
trans-unit.target: This package has been deprecated as it has critical bugs and is no longer maintained.

trans-unit.source: You have {0} deprecated package versions installed.
trans-unit.target: You have {0} deprecated package versions installed.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the number of installed package versions

trans-unit.source: You have {0} vulnerable package versions and {1} deprecated package versions installed.
trans-unit.target: You have {0} vulnerable package versions and {1} deprecated package versions installed.
trans-unit.note: {0} and {1} are numbers of installed package versions

trans-unit.source: You have {0} vulnerable package versions installed.
trans-unit.target: You have {0} vulnerable package versions installed.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the number of installed package versions

trans-unit.source: These installed package versions contain vulnerabilities: {0}
trans-unit.target: These installed package versions contain vulnerabilities: {0}
trans-unit.note: {0} are package versions

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while fetching additional information about the package. Refresh to try again.
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while fetching additional information about the package. Refresh to try again.

trans-unit.source: Select to view package details for more information.
trans-unit.target: Select to view package details for more information.

trans-unit.source: This package version has a vulnerability with {0} severity.
trans-unit.target: This package version has a vulnerability with {0} severity.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the severity of the vulnerability
{0} is the number of vulnerabilities

trans-unit.source: This package version has at least one vulnerability with {0} severity. It may lead to specific problems in your project. Try updating the package version.
trans-unit.target: This package version has at least one vulnerability with {0} severity. It may lead to specific problems in your project. Try updating the package version.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the severity of the vulnerability
{0} is the severity of the vulnerability
{0} = license name. Examples: MIT, Apache

trans-unit.source: Common NuGet configurations; How settings are applied.
trans-unit.target: Common NuGet configurations; How settings are applied.

trans-unit.source: Migration failed as packages {0} could not be uninstalled. These packages were not found in the solution packages folder. No changes were made to the project.
trans-unit.target: Migration failed as packages {0} could not be uninstalled. These packages were not found in the solution packages folder. No changes were made to the project.

trans-unit.note: Millions in short format notation
{0} = number of packages
{0} = number of packages

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while trying to restore packages:
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while trying to restore packages:

trans-unit.note: {0} - Version of package, {1} - Packages that transitively reference the package
{0} = Old package ID, {1} = Old package version, {2} = New package ID, {3} = New package version

trans-unit.source: Multiple packages failed to uninstall. Restart Visual Studio to finish the process.
trans-unit.target: Multiple packages failed to uninstall. Restart Visual Studio to finish the process.

trans-unit.source: The package at '{0}' failed to uninstall. Restart Visual Studio to finish the process.
trans-unit.target: The package at '{0}' failed to uninstall. Restart Visual Studio to finish the process.

trans-unit.note: {0} :error message; {1}: date and time
{0} for date and time string

trans-unit.source: The name specified has already been added to the list of available package sources. Please provide a unique name.
trans-unit.target: The name specified has already been added to the list of available package sources. Please provide a unique name.

trans-unit.source: The source specified has already been added to the list of available package sources. Please provide a unique source.
trans-unit.target: The source specified has already been added to the list of available package sources. Please provide a unique source.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while loading packages
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while loading packages

trans-unit.source: Visual Studio is about to make changes to this solution:
trans-unit.target: Visual Studio is about to make changes to this solution:

trans-unit.source: Help me migrate to NuGet PackageReference
trans-unit.target: Help me migrate to NuGet PackageReference

trans-unit.source: Each package is licensed to you by its owner. NuGet is not responsible for, nor does it grant any licenses to, third-party packages.
trans-unit.target: Each package is licensed to you by its owner. NuGet is not responsible for, nor does it grant any licenses to, third-party packages.

trans-unit.source: The following package(s) require that you accept their license terms before installing.
trans-unit.target: The following package(s) require that you accept their license terms before installing.

trans-unit.source: By clicking "I Accept," you agree to the license terms for the package(s) listed above. If you do not agree to the license terms, click "I Decline."
trans-unit.target: By clicking "I Accept," you agree to the license terms for the package(s) listed above. If you do not agree to the license terms, click "I Decline."

trans-unit.source: You can manage these settings in
trans-unit.target: You can manage these settings in

trans-unit.note: In the solution package manager, if the select package has multiple versions installed, then this message is shown.

trans-unit.source: There is no README available for the selected package version. For more information please visit [aka.ms/nuget/noreadme](https://aka.ms/nuget/noreadme).
trans-unit.target: There is no README available for the selected package version. For more information please visit [aka.ms/nuget/noreadme](https://aka.ms/nuget/noreadme).
trans-unit.note: {Locked="[aka.ms/nuget/noreadme](https://aka.ms/nuget/noreadme)"} "[aka.ms/nuget/noreadme](https://aka.ms/nuget/noreadme)" this is a URL link and should not be translated
In the solution package manager, if the select package is not installed, then this message is shown.

trans-unit.source: The package manager format will apply to the following projects in this Solution
trans-unit.target: The package manager format will apply to the following projects in this Solution

trans-unit.source: A package source mapping will be created.
trans-unit.target: A package source mapping will be created.

trans-unit.source: Projects with PackageReference are not supported in Visual Studio 2015 and earlier.
trans-unit.target: Projects with PackageReference are not supported in Visual Studio 2015 and earlier.

trans-unit.note: The text to be displayed in the search box

trans-unit.source: Retrieving results from one or more sources
trans-unit.target: Retrieving results from one or more sources

trans-unit.source: Unable to retrieve results from one or more sources
trans-unit.target: Unable to retrieve results from one or more sources

trans-unit.source: Migrate this project from packages.config to PackageReference format.
trans-unit.target: Migrate this project from packages.config to PackageReference format.

trans-unit.note: Thousands in short format notation

trans-unit.source: Following versions are unavailable due to additional constraints in the project or packages.config
trans-unit.target: Following versions are unavailable due to additional constraints in the project or packages.config

trans-unit.source: IntelliCode package suggestion based on this project context
trans-unit.target: IntelliCode package suggestion based on this project context

trans-unit.note: {0} is a version number

trans-unit.source: To learn more about transitive paths, see
trans-unit.target: To learn more about transitive paths, see

trans-unit.source: The ID prefix of this package has been reserved for the owner of the package by the currently selected feed
trans-unit.target: The ID prefix of this package has been reserved for the owner of the package by the currently selected feed

trans-unit.note: American trillions in short format notation

trans-unit.source: Dependency version defined by VersionOverride, modify project file to change package version.
trans-unit.target: Dependency version defined by VersionOverride, modify project file to change package version.

trans-unit.source: NuGet migrate failed to install packages as PackageReference. Changed files are backed up at {0}
trans-unit.target: NuGet migrate failed to install packages as PackageReference. Changed files are backed up at {0}

trans-unit.source: Please follow simple instructions from {0} to go back to previous state.
trans-unit.target: Please follow simple instructions from {0} to go back to previous state.

trans-unit.source: NuGet upgrade failed to uninstall packages from packages.config so rolled back to previous state.
trans-unit.target: NuGet upgrade failed to uninstall packages from packages.config so rolled back to previous state.

trans-unit.source: The project cannot be upgraded as backing up the project file and packages.config ran into an issue.
trans-unit.target: The project cannot be upgraded as backing up the project file and packages.config ran into an issue.

trans-unit.source: Unable to determine compatibility of package as {0}.nupkg was not found on disk. The project cannot be migrated.
trans-unit.target: Unable to determine compatibility of package as {0}.nupkg was not found on disk. The project cannot be migrated.

trans-unit.source: Once started, this action cannot be cancelled.
trans-unit.target: Once started, this action cannot be cancelled.

trans-unit.source: You are attempting to add an HTTP source, which is insecure. Would you like to proceed with adding this insecure HTTP source?
trans-unit.target: You are attempting to add an HTTP source, which is insecure. Would you like to proceed with adding this insecure HTTP source?

trans-unit.source: AllowInsecureConnections is enabled and allows http access. Note: This method is not secure. For secure options, see https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere.
trans-unit.target: AllowInsecureConnections is enabled and allows http access. Note: This method is not secure. For secure options, see https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere.

trans-unit.source: These options are not applicable to projects managing their dependencies through project.json or PackageReference
trans-unit.target: These options are not applicable to projects managing their dependencies through project.json or PackageReference
trans-unit.note: To be displayed for the VS UI opened through a solution. bug #2665
{0} is the project name
